stemHtml: On navigational charts, the magnetic variation is indicated with isogonals. State the reason why the year, for which the isogonals are valid, is noted in the chart index.

options.a: The magnetic variation changes over time due to the movement of the magnetic pole inside the Earth.
options.b: The magnetic field reduces in intensity each year due to the half-life of the magnetised material inside the Earth.
options.c: The magnetic variation changes due to the ionospheric disturbances caused by solar storms.
options.d: The intensity of the Earth's magnetic field decreases over time due to rotation of the Earth.
